title: SpaceCraftX - Reloaded [Addon for Galacticraft]
description: The continuation of the abandoned SpaceCraftX mod by Militario
body:
**[Main Page is on CurseForge!](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spacecraftx-reloaded)**  
**Developed and Maintained by ROMVoid95!.**

# Getting Started
SpaceCraftX mod is an Galacticraft addons wich allow you explore the space aboard new rockets and reuse them like IRL.


## FalconCraft 9
The FalconCraft 9 booster allow you allow you to propel yourself in the overworld into space.

Like a basic Galacticraft rocket the FalconCraft 9 need fuel as well liquid oxygen delivered by an oxygen loader.

When the FalconCraft 9 is launched it will automaticaly separate itself the second stage at a certain height and land where it was launched.

When it has landed you can recover it and renovate it to reuse with a Galacticraft wrench.

You can place it just like a Galacticraft rocket on the landing pads.

To seen fuel and liquid oxygen level simply right cilck on the rocket.

## DragonCraft capsule
The DragonCraft capsule allow you to land on the Galacticraft planets and leave them by relaunching the capsule.

In the overworld you can launch it but need to propel it with a full FalconCraft 9 rocket to go into space.

Like a basic Galacticraft rocket the DragonCraft capsule need fuel as well liquid oxygen delivered by an oxygen loader and you need to prefuel it before placing it on the rocket.

When it land on the overworld you need to recover it and renovate it to reuse with a Galacticraft wrench.

To get a full falconcraft 9 with the dragoncraft capsule, place in order by right click on the base of a FalconCraft 9 a second stage then, with a right click on the second stage place a dragoncraft trunk and finally with a right click too on the dragoncraft trunk place a dragoncraft capsule.

When the capsule launched with the falconcraft 9, the landing pads will set on the landing pads slot in the capsule menu, to seen it just right click on the capsule.

## Second stage and the DragonCraft trunk
The second stage allow to propel the DragonCraft capsule into the space.

When it reach the space it falls like a fireball (do not cause any explosion damage) around the launch position.

You can recover it and renovate it to reuse with a Galacticraft wrench.

You need to prefuel it before placing it on the rocket.

To seen fuel and liquid oxygen level simply right cilck on the rocket.

To place it on the FalconCraft 9 just right click with it on the base of the FalconCraft 9 and it appear.

The DragonCraft trunk is a support for the DragonCraft capsule like the second stage when it reach the space it falls like a fireball around the launch position and you can recover it and renovate it to reuse with a Galacticraft wrench.

To place it on the second stage just right click with it on the the second stage and it appear.
